---
title: "viz3"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(waffle)
```


```{r}
water <- read_csv(here("data/aquastat_asia.csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
  clean_names()

my_tan <- "#D6B588"
```

```{r}
# Pivot data wider to get variables out of "variable" column and into their own
water_wider <- water %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = value,
              id_cols = c(area, year)) %>% 
  clean_names()

```

```{r}
library(sf)

world <- st_read(here("data/countries/ne_50m_admin_0_countries.shp")) %>% 
  clean_names()
asia <- world[world$continent == "Asia", ] %>% 
  select("admin", "geometry")
```


```{r}
water_wider$area[water_wider$area == "Türkiye"] <- "Turkey"
water_wider$area[water_wider$area == "Iran (Islamic Republic of)"] <- "Iran"
water_wider$area[water_wider$area == "Syrian Arab Republic"] <- "Syria"
unique(water_wider$area)


```

```{r}
#| hide: True
#| echo: False
#| include: False
common_countries <- intersect(water_wider$area, asia$admin)

asia_clean <- asia %>%
  filter(admin %in% common_countries)

water_clean <- water_wider %>%
  filter(area %in% common_countries)

asia_joined <- asia_clean %>%
  left_join(water_clean, by = c("admin" = "area"))
```


```{r}
# Saudi Arabia: Water Withdrawals vs Precipitation — Waffle Charts
# install.packages("waffle", repos = "https://cinc.rud.is/drat/")

library(waffle)
library(dplyr)
library(gridExtra)

sa <- asia_joined |>
  filter(admin == "Iran", year == 2020)

agri   <- sa$agricultural_water_withdrawal
indus  <- sa$industrial_water_withdrawal
muni   <- sa$municipal_water_withdrawal
precip <- sa$long_term_average_annual_precipitation_in_volume
total_withdrawal <- agri + indus + muni

cell_volume <- total_withdrawal / 100
precip_cells <- round(precip / cell_volume)

w_counts <- round(c(agri, indus, muni) / cell_volume)
w_counts[1] <- w_counts[1] + (100 - sum(w_counts))

colours <- c(
  "Agricultural"  = "#C8892A",
  "Industrial"    = "grey40",
  "Municipal"     = "#4A7B9D",
  "Precipitation" = "#7EB8D4"
)

withdrawal_vec <- c(
  "Agricultural" = w_counts[1],
  "Industrial"   = w_counts[2],
  "Municipal"    = w_counts[3]
)
precip_vec <- c("Precipitation" = precip_cells)

p1 <- waffle(precip_vec,
             rows   = 20,
             colors = colours["Precipitation"],
             title  = sprintf("Annual Precipitation  (%.2f km³)", precip),
             xlab   = sprintf("1 square = %.4f km³", cell_volume))

p2 <- waffle(withdrawal_vec,
             rows   = 10,
             colors = colours[names(withdrawal_vec)],
             title  = sprintf("Total Water Withdrawal  (%.2f km³)", total_withdrawal),
             xlab   = sprintf("1 square = %.4f km³", cell_volume))

grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2, widths = c(4, 1))
```
```{r}
p1 <- waffle(precip_vec,
             rows = 20,
             colors = colours["Precipitation"],
             legend_pos = "none",
             pad = 1,
             size = 0.5)

p2 <- waffle(withdrawal_vec,
             rows = 10,
             colors = colours[names(withdrawal_vec)],
             legend_pos = "none",
             pad = 1,
             size = 0.5)

p1
p2

```
